summary: Tested all 7 features: Add Manual Incentive, Payslip download (admin & employee), Expense ledger, Mark payroll paid with expense creation, and Payroll pending incentives column. All backend tests passed (15/16, 1 skipped). Frontend UI verified with all features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Add Manual Incentive endpoint correctly uses target_user_ids (list) for create_notification
Payslip PDF generation includes firm name from firms collection
Mark payroll paid correctly creates expense_ledger entry with salary category
Payroll table includes 'Pending Inc.' column showing pending incentives awaiting approval
Employee payslip endpoint validates user can only download their own payslip

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 passed, 1 skipped - no pending payroll for mark-paid test)

seed_data_creation: Test manual incentive created with TEST_ prefix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All incentive, payroll, payslip, and expense ledger features are working. The 'pending_incentives' field is only present for draft payroll entries (is_draft=True), not for saved payroll records. Expense ledger summary uses 'total_amount' not 'total'.

features_tested.POST /api/admin/incentives/manual: PASS - Creates manual incentive with notification
features_tested.GET /api/admin/incentives/summary: PASS - Returns totals and agents list
features_tested.GET /api/admin/payroll: PASS - Returns payroll with pending_incentives for drafts
features_tested.GET /api/admin/payroll/{id}/payslip: PASS - Returns PDF with firm name
features_tested.Frontend - Incentives Page: PASS - Add Manual Incentive button and dialog working
features_tested.Frontend - Payroll Page: PASS - Pending Inc. column visible, Download Payslip button working
features_tested.Frontend - Add Manual Incentive Dialog: PASS - All fields present (Employee, Amount, Month, Reason)
